name: High-Protein Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bran flakes, raisins, and milk in a large mixing bowl.
2. Stir together whole wheat flour, soy flour, wheat germ, baking powder, nutmeg, and salt; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine eggs, honey, oil, and molasses; blend well. Add egg mixture to soaked bran flakes; mix until combined.
4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the bran mixture, stirring just enough to moisten. Spoon batter into paper-lined 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
